mapper.sql: id, title, author, isbn, publisher, publish_date, price, stock, description, category_id, created_at, updated_at, deleted
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM book WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0

SELECT
FROM book WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT
FROM book WHERE category_id = #{categoryId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO book (title, author, isbn, publisher, publish_date, price, stock, description, category_id, created_at, updated_at, deleted) VALUES (#{title}, #{author}, #{isbn}, #{publisher}, #{publishDate}, #{price}, #{stock}, #{description}, #{categoryId}, NOW(), NOW(), 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE book SET title = #{title}, author = #{author}, isbn = #{isbn}, publisher = #{publisher}, publish_date = #{publishDate}, price = #{price}, stock = #{stock}, description = #{description}, category_id = #{categoryId}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
